_comment: 凛（Rin）生成UIの設定ファイル。id=random はおまかせ。

situations.label: お寺・神社
situations.en_prompt: at a traditional Japanese shrine with stone lanterns, ancient wooden architecture, and a gravel pathway
poses: hands clasped in prayer, eyes gently closed
standing before a torii gate, serene gaze ahead
sitting on stone steps, contemplative expression
walking slowly along a gravel path, glancing at ancient surroundings

situations.label: 和風庭園
situations.en_prompt: in a traditional Japanese garden with moss-covered stones, stone lanterns, and a tranquil koi pond
poses: gazing softly at the koi pond, gentle smile
crouching beside flowering plants, examining them closely
standing under a maple tree, looking upward peacefully
walking along a stone path between bamboo, holding a folded fan

situations.label: 和室・茶室
situations.en_prompt: inside a traditional Japanese tatami room with shoji screens, soft natural light filtering through paper panels
poses: seated in seiza on tatami, hands resting gracefully on lap
performing a tea ceremony, carefully whisking matcha in a ceramic bowl
arranging ikebana flowers in a ceramic vase beside a tokonoma alcove
looking through shoji screen at the garden view, thoughtful expression

situations.label: 京都の街並み
situations.en_prompt: on a quiet Kyoto street lined with traditional machiya townhouses, stone walls, and old stone lanterns
poses: walking gracefully along a narrow stone-paved lane
pausing beside a bamboo fence, holding a paper umbrella
standing near an old merchant house entrance, soft curious expression
looking around a corner, one hand resting lightly on a stone wall

patterns.label: 無地
patterns.en: solid plain fabric with subtle woven silk texture, no printed pattern

patterns.label: 藤
patterns.en: wisteria (fuji) blossom pattern with cascading clusters

patterns.label: 吉祥文様
patterns.en: auspicious treasure (takarazukushi) motif with classic Japanese lucky symbols

patterns.label: 幾何学（麻の葉）
patterns.en: geometric hemp-leaf (asanoha) pattern of interlocking hexagons

patterns.label: 蝶
patterns.en: elegant butterfly (cho) motif with delicate wing details

patterns.label: 波（青海波）
patterns.en: traditional wave (seigaiha) pattern of overlapping semicircles

patterns.label: 流水
patterns.en: flowing-water (ryusui) motif with gentle meandering stream lines

patterns.label: 菊
patterns.en: chrysanthemum (kiku) pattern with full rounded petals

patterns.label: 桔梗
patterns.en: bellflower (kikyo) pattern with five-petaled star-shaped blooms

patterns.label: 紅葉
patterns.en: maple-leaf (momiji) pattern with scattered autumn foliage

patterns.label: 葡萄
patterns.en: grape cluster (budo) motif with bunches of round fruit and vine leaves

patterns.label: 梅
patterns.en: plum blossom (ume) pattern with round five-petaled flowers

patterns.label: 椿
patterns.en: camellia (tsubaki) pattern with bold round blooms and glossy leaves

patterns.label: 橘（蜜柑）
patterns.en: mandarin orange (tachibana) motif with round fruit and leaves

patterns.label: 雪輪
patterns.en: snowflake (yukiwa) pattern of rounded geometric snow-ring shapes

expressions.label: 笑顔
expressions.en: bright warm smile, cheerful joyful expression

expressions.label: おっとり微笑み
expressions.en: gentle soft smile, calm serene peaceful expression

expressions.label: 凛々しい

expressions.label: 神秘的
expressions.en: mysterious subtle gaze, enigmatic quiet expression

weather.label: 晴れ
weather.en: bright clear weather, warm golden sunlight filtering through

weather.label: 曇り
